description: Soft bright, juicy mango gummies with a farmers-market fruit character, a glossy confectioner’s finish, and a cannabis infusion folded in as smoothly as a secret family recipe. It blends CBG to support daytime focus and clarity, CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect, and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 1:1:1 ratio. Made for anyone who wants their edible to feel less like a dose and more like a little indulgence.
